title: No Java source code generated — entire src/ directory is missing
evidence: find rep3/ -name '*.java' returns 0 files; no src/ directory exists. Only pom.xml and README.md were created.
suggestion: Agent must generate Java source files under src/main/java/ implementing the Spring Boot application

title: POST /books endpoint not implemented
evidence: No Java source files exist in the workspace — no controller, service, or repository classes
suggestion: Implement a BookController with a @PostMapping /books handler

title: GET /books list endpoint not implemented
evidence: No Java source files exist in the workspace
suggestion: Implement a @GetMapping /books handler returning all books

title: GET /books ?author= filter not implemented
evidence: No Java source files exist in the workspace
suggestion: Add @RequestParam author filter to the list endpoint

title: GET /books/{id} endpoint not implemented
evidence: No Java source files exist in the workspace

evidence: No Java source files exist in the workspace

title: DELETE /books/{id} endpoint not implemented
evidence: No Java source files exist in the workspace

title: SQLite storage not implemented
evidence: pom.xml includes sqlite-jdbc 3.45.1.0 and hibernate-community-dialects dependencies, but no entity classes, repository interfaces, or application.properties configuring the datasource exist
suggestion: Create JPA entity, repository, and configure SQLite dialect in application.properties

title: No JSON responses with HTTP status codes
evidence: No controller classes exist to return ResponseEntity with status codes

title: Input validation not implemented
evidence: pom.xml includes spring-boot-starter-validation but no @Valid annotations or constraint annotations exist (no Java files)
suggestion: Add @NotBlank on title/author fields in a Book entity and @Valid on controller params

title: GET /health endpoint not implemented
evidence: No Java source files exist — no HealthController or actuator configuration

title: No tests exist
evidence: No .java files found anywhere in workspace; 0 test classes under src/test/
suggestion: Create at least 3 test classes covering CRUD operations and validation
